description: 7 pastel 1920x1080 garden/outdoor scenes for virtual pet environments. Soft pastel colors, painterly impressionistic style with geometric low-poly elements.

1.png.name: Garden Path
1.png.description: Pathway lined with trees leading to a classical building with large windows. Soft pastel colors, serene atmosphere with geometric low-poly rendering effect.

2.png.name: Winding Path
2.png.description: Winding stone pathway through dense pink, purple and green foliage. Dreamy impressionist style with dappled sunlight filtering through leaves.

3.png.name: Wooden Swing
3.png.description: Rope swing suspended from tree branches, surrounded by lush greenery. Pink, purple, green and beige pastels. Nostalgic, tranquil mood.

4.png.name: Suburban House
4.png.description: Large gabled-roof house set in wooded area with stone/brick facade. Driveway curves toward house. Pink/purple/beige sky, dreamy impressionist style.

5.png.name: Cherry Blossom Bridge
5.png.description: Arched bridge with metal railings, cherry blossom trees in full bloom. Pink and white petals, warm romantic spring atmosphere. Painterly style.

6.png.name: Patio Dining
6.png.description: Outdoor dining patio with wooden table, wicker chairs, plates set for a meal. Warm earthy tones of brown, beige, green. Serene backyard setting.

7.png.name: Greenhouse Garden
7.png.description: Glass greenhouse surrounded by foliage. Autumn tree with vibrant pink and orange leaves in foreground. Mosaic-like geometric style, peaceful mood.
